expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":2},"children":["Here's everything I've pulled together from your Tanzania trip"]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"info","title":"Five pieces, one trip"},"children":["I've read your notes file, the cost spreadsheet, the Ngorongoro park-fee PDF, your Stone Town photo, and your voice memo from the crater. Here's what we're working with."]},{"type":"Panel","props":{"title":"📓 tanzaniamemories.md — your trip notes"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["A detailed planning document for you and Athina Mari — itinerary, dates, contacts, and things to sort out before you go. The notes cover the full arc of the trip, from flights and transfers through the safari legs and Zanzibar."]}]},{"type":"Panel","props":{"title":"💰 trip-costs.xlsx — the money"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Your cost tracker — line items with amounts, categories, and what's been paid vs still owed. This is the one you'll want to keep updated as payments go out."]}]},{"type":"Panel","props":{"title":"🏞️ ngorongoro-conservation-area-tariffs.pdf — the official fees"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["The NCA's own fee schedule — entry fees, vehicle charges, ranger costs. Crucially, this is the document that tells us whether that ~5,000 TZS ranger tip Emmanuel mentioned is real or something Richard needs to clarify."]}]},{"type":"Panel","props":{"title":"🕌 stone-town-zanzibar.jpg — your photo"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["A lovely shot looking up into a bright Stone Town courtyard — a tall white building with arched windows, dark wooden balconies, and carved railings. Classic Zanzibari architecture, the kind you only get in those narrow Stone Town lanes."]}]},{"type":"Panel","props":{"title":"🎙️ voice-memo.mp3 — the crater day"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Your recording from the Ngorongoro rim. Highlights:",{"type":"br","props":{},"children":[]},"• Best day of your life — wildlife everywhere, right up close.",{"type":"br","props":{},"children":[]},"• Your driver-guide was ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Emmanuel"]}," (not Richard from the office) — knew his stuff.",{"type":"br","props":{},"children":[]},"• Bought ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["two beaded bracelets"]}," from a Maasai lady for ~$20-25 (~35,000 TZS).",{"type":"br","props":{},"children":[]},"• Emmanuel flagged an ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["extra ranger tip"]}," at the gate: ~5,000 TZS cash, ",{"type":"Em","props":{},"children":["separate"]}," from park fees — nobody warned you about this.",{"type":"br","props":{},"children":[]},"• ⚠️ ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Open question:"]}," you want to ask Richard about that ranger tip before settling the safari balance."]}]},{"type":"Divider","props":{},"children":[]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":[{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Here's the thing:"]}," you've got six different sources (notes, spreadsheet, PDF, a photo, a voice memo, and the transcript of that memo) — and once you're on the ground in Tanzania, swiping through all of that on your phone to find one figure or one contact is going to be a nightmare. What you really want is ",{"type":"Em","props":{},"children":["one place"]}," you can open — on your phone — that has the itinerary, the costs (with what's paid and what's not), the contacts, the photo, and the loose ends like that ranger-tip question, all together."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":[{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Want me to put this together for you?"]}," I can build you an app right here — a page you open on your phone that pulls in every cost from the spreadsheet, every stop from your notes, the park fees from the PDF, your Stone Town photo, and the crater-day details from your voice memo. Plus I'll set up separate specialists for each part of the trip (the safari legs, Zanzibar, the logistics) so when you ask \"what's the ranger fee?\" or \"what did I pay for the bracelets?\" it answers from your own material instead of a web search."]}]}
